evals.prompt: I have three NotebookLM audio exports in topics/jobs/finom/artifacts/notebooklm/_outputs. Transcribe them locally on this Apple Silicon Mac, avoid cloud APIs, and overwrite the existing .txt files.
evals.expected_output: Uses WhisperKit locally, prefers cached model path, and writes .txt transcripts next to each audio file.

evals.prompt: Show me the exact command to transcribe /tmp/interview.m4a fully offline with WhisperKit, assuming the model is already cached locally.
evals.expected_output: Returns a strict local-only command using --model-path rather than --model.

evals.prompt: Batch transcribe a folder of customer call recordings into text files beside the audio, but do not overwrite transcripts that already exist.
evals.expected_output: Uses the batch workflow and respects existing transcript files unless overwrite is requested.
